title: Odisha Poised To Enter New Phase Of Growth After Railway Expansion: Ashwini Vaishnaw
description: Taking a veiled swipe at opposition parties such as the Biju Janata Dal and the Indian National Congress who have been alleging neglect to the state by the Indian Railways, the minister asserted that the pace and magnitude of ongoing railway projects mark a decisive shift from the past, with Odisha now receiving sustained attention in national infrastructure planning
